summary: App with account creation flow and task posting feature for proxies/proxiis service.

existing_features.title: In HubView.tsx, replace the message 'Connection is still initializing. Please wait a moment and try again.' (shown when the user tries to post a task but is not yet authenticated or connected) with the message 'Make an account first to post the task in proxies.'

new_feature_requests.summary: Replace 'connection is still initializing' message with 'Make an account first to post the task in proxies'
